{{html clean="false" wiki="false"}}
<div id="qf-panel-container"></div>
<div id="qf-popover" style="display:none;position:absolute;z-index:9999;background:#212529;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;" onclick="qfOpenFormWithAnchor()">Add Comment</div>
<script type="text/javascript">
//<![CDATA[
(function(){
  var path = window.location.pathname;
  var parts = path.split('/bin/view/');
  var docRef = parts.length > 1 ? decodeURIComponent(parts[1]).replace(/\/$/, '') : '';
  if (docRef.indexOf('WebHome') === -1) { docRef = docRef + '.WebHome'; }
  docRef = docRef.replace(/\//g, '.');
  var returnUrl = window.location.pathname;

  fetch('/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderPanel?docRef=' + encodeURIComponent(docRef) + '&returnUrl=' + encodeURIComponent(returnUrl))
    .then(function(r) { return r.text(); })
    .then(function(h) {
      document.getElementById('qf-panel-container').innerHTML = h;
      injectHighlights();
    });

  var popover = document.getElementById('qf-popover');
  var capturedText = '';

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function(e) {
    if (e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#qf-panel-container')) return;
    if (e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#qf-popover')) return;
    setTimeout(function() {
      var sel = window.getSelection();
      var text = sel ? sel.toString().trim() : '';
      if (text.length < 3) { popover.style.display = 'none'; return; }
      capturedText = text.substring(0, 500);
      var rect = sel.getRangeAt(0).getBoundingClientRect();
      popover.style.top = (window.scrollY + rect.bottom + 6) + 'px';
      popover.style.left = (window.scrollX + rect.left) + 'px';
      popover.style.display = 'block';
    }, 10);
  });

  document.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    if (!popover.contains(e.target)) { popover.style.display = 'none'; }
  });

  // Global function: scroll from sidebar anchor indicator to the highlighted text
  window.qfScrollToMark = function(commentId) {
    var marks = document.querySelectorAll('mark[data-comment-id="' + commentId + '"]');
    if (marks.length) {
      marks[0].scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
      marks[0].style.background = 'rgba(255,200,0,.7)';
      setTimeout(function() { marks[0].style.background = 'rgba(255,243,128,.45)'; }, 2500);
    } else {
      alert('Highlighted text not found on page. The content may have changed since this comment was added.');
    }
  };

  window.qfOpenFormWithAnchor = function() {
    popover.style.display = 'none';
    var form = document.getElementById('qf-add-comment-form');
    if (form) form.style.display = 'block';
    var ai = form ? form.querySelector('input[name="anchorText"]') : null;
    if (ai) ai.value = capturedText;
    var p = document.getElementById('qf-anchor-preview');
    if (!p && form) {
      p = document.createElement('div');
      p.id = 'qf-anchor-preview';
      p.style.cssText = 'background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffda6a;border-radius:4px;padding:6px;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:8px;color:#664d03;';
      var formEl = form.querySelector('form');
      if (formEl) formEl.insertBefore(p, formEl.firstChild);
    }
    if (p) {
      var preview = capturedText.substring(0, 80);
      if (capturedText.length > 80) preview = preview + '...';
      p.innerHTML = 'Anchored to: <em>' + preview + '</em>';
      p.style.display = 'block';
    }
    window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
  };

  function injectHighlights() {
    var url = '/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderHighlights?docRef=' + encodeURIComponent(docRef);
    console.log('[QF] Fetching highlights:', url);
    fetch(url)
      .then(function(r) { return r.text(); })
      .then(function(raw) {
        console.log('[QF] Response:', raw.substring(0, 300));
        var comments;
        try { comments = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { console.error('[QF] Parse error:', e); return; }
        console.log('[QF] Comments with anchors:', comments.length);

        var area = document.getElementById('xwikicontent')
                || document.querySelector('.xcontent')
                || document.getElementById('mainContentArea')
                || document.body;
        console.log('[QF] Area found:', area.id || area.className);

        comments.forEach(function(c) {
          if (!c.anchorText || c.anchorText.trim() === '') return;
          console.log('[QF] Searching for:', c.anchorText.substring(0, 60));

          var found = area.textContent.indexOf(c.anchorText) !== -1;
          console.log('[QF] Direct match in textContent:', found);
          if (!found) {
            var norm = area.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
            var normSearch = c.anchorText.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
            found = norm.indexOf(normSearch) !== -1;
            console.log('[QF] Normalized match:', found);
          }

          var bg = 'rgba(255,243,128,.45)';
          var border = '#ffc107';
          if (c.status === 'Resolved') { bg = 'rgba(108,117,125,.1)'; border = '#adb5bd'; }
          else if (c.type === 'Blocker') { border = '#dc3545'; }
          else if (c.type === 'Suggestion') { border = '#0d6efd'; }

          wrapText(area, c.anchorText, bg, border, c.id);
        });
      })
      .catch(function(e) { console.error('[QF] Fetch error:', e); });
  }

  function wrapText(container, searchText, bgColor, borderColor, commentId) {
    var normalizedSearch = searchText.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    if (!normalizedSearch) return;

    var walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
    var node;

    while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
      var idx = node.nodeValue.indexOf(searchText);
      if (idx === -1) {
        idx = node.nodeValue.indexOf(normalizedSearch);
      }
      if (idx === -1) {
        var nodeNorm = node.nodeValue.replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
        idx = nodeNorm.indexOf(normalizedSearch);
      }
      if (idx !== -1) {
        var len = Math.min(searchText.length, node.nodeValue.length - idx);
        applyMark(node, idx, len, bgColor, borderColor, commentId);
        console.log('[QF] Highlight applied for comment', commentId);
        return;
      }
    }

    // Fallback: concatenate and search across nodes
    var textNodes = [];
    var fullText = '';
    walker = document.createTreeWalker(container, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
    while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
      textNodes.push({ node: node, start: fullText.length });
      fullText = fullText + node.nodeValue;
    }

    var searchIdx = fullText.indexOf(searchText);
    if (searchIdx === -1) { searchIdx = fullText.indexOf(normalizedSearch); }
    if (searchIdx === -1) {
      var partial = normalizedSearch.substring(0, 30);
      searchIdx = fullText.indexOf(partial);
    }
    if (searchIdx === -1) {
      console.log('[QF] Could not find text for comment', commentId);
      return;
    }

    for (var i = 0; i < textNodes.length; i++) {
      var tnStart = textNodes[i].start;
      var tnEnd = tnStart + textNodes[i].node.nodeValue.length;
      if (searchIdx >= tnStart && searchIdx < tnEnd) {
        var localIdx = searchIdx - tnStart;
        var localLen = Math.min(textNodes[i].node.nodeValue.length - localIdx, normalizedSearch.length);
        applyMark(textNodes[i].node, localIdx, localLen, bgColor, borderColor, commentId);
        console.log('[QF] Highlight applied (cross-node) for comment', commentId);
        return;
      }
    }
    console.log('[QF] Failed to apply highlight for comment', commentId);
  }

  function applyMark(textNode, idx, matchLen, bgColor, borderColor, commentId) {
    var before = textNode.nodeValue.substring(0, idx);
    var matchText = textNode.nodeValue.substring(idx, idx + matchLen);
    var after = textNode.nodeValue.substring(idx + matchLen);

    var mark = document.createElement('mark');
    mark.style.cssText = 'background:' + bgColor + ';border-bottom:2px solid ' + borderColor + ';cursor:pointer;border-radius:2px;padding:0 1px;';
    mark.setAttribute('data-comment-id', commentId);
    mark.title = 'Click to see comment';
    mark.textContent = matchText;
    mark.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var id = this.getAttribute('data-comment-id');
      var card = document.querySelector('[data-qf-card="' + id + '"]');
      if (card) {
        card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
        card.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 3px rgba(13,110,253,.4)';
        setTimeout(function() { card.style.boxShadow = ''; }, 2500);
      }
    });

    var parent = textNode.parentNode;
    if (before) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(before), textNode);
    parent.insertBefore(mark, textNode);
    if (after) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(after), textNode);
    parent.removeChild(textNode);
  }
})();
//]]>
</script>
{{/html}}
